# kemp_acme_certificate_renewal (Resource)

Triggers a manual renewal of a `kemp_acme_certificate` via `renewacmecert`.

This is an action resource — Create fires the renewal; Read and Delete are no-ops. Use the `triggers` map to force re-renewal: any change to triggers destroys and recreates the resource, firing another renewal.

Note: `renewacmecert` is asynchronous. LoadMaster accepts the request and returns immediately; the actual certificate refresh happens in the background.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Force a manual renewal. Change the `version` trigger value to re-fire
# renewacmecert on the next `terraform apply`.

resource "kemp_acme_certificate_renewal" "force" {
  cert_name = kemp_acme_certificate.my_cert.name
  acme_type = "letsencrypt"

  triggers = {
    version = "1"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `acme_type` (String) ACME provider: `letsencrypt` or `digicert`.
- `cert_name` (String) Name of the ACME certificate to renew (matches `name` on `kemp_acme_certificate`).

### Optional

- `triggers` (Map of String) Arbitrary key-value map. Any change to this map destroys and recreates the resource, triggering another renewal.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
